text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On a deserted island somewhere in the middle of
the ocean...
A ship drops off a dumbfounded Mejiro McQueen
and quickly departs.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
What is the meaning of this? What could they
possibly mean by "survive the night?"

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Do you know anything about this, Trainer?
choice_data_list: It's a project for the school newspaper.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her everything I know—that this is for an
article called "Deserted Island: How Will the
Pampered Survive?"

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I see. So they want a sheltered person like me to
try and overcome the dangers of a place like this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Then I will gladly accept the challenge! I won't be
intimidated by the likes of this island!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Th-that said, it is a rather unsettling place. The
thought of having to spend an entire night here
is...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Aaaah! Is that a tiger?! A Bengal tiger?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I will not be bested!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
First things first. We must come up with a plan. I'll
need your assistance, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
What is the most important thing for surviving on
a deserted island? Come, let's hear your answer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The most essential thing for survival is...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Food... You're saying that as long as we have
nourishment, there's nothing to fear?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You're right. I'll never get home if all I do is sit
here and dread the worst. It's time I start fending
for myself!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Now then, Trainer, whenever you're ready.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Why, the food! You're going to bring us some,
aren't you? I promise, I'll eat anything necessary
to survive!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I won't be picky, be it fruit or seafood. Now, get
to it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so Mejiro McQueen is able to secure food
without so much as lifting a finger.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Endurance... I see. Without inexhaustible
endurance, getting home safe is nothing but a
fantasy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I suppose that means I will have to best that tiger
in order to get stronger...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Eeeeek! Is it still lurking in the bush?! I don't think
I can do this after all!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I don't think this endurance idea will work out,
Trainer... I couldn't possibly—aaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The beast chases Mejiro McQueen around and
around. I can't help but think that this may just be
helping to improve her endurance.
